vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening (4 settlements + 4 roads), board fit from empty_baseline (residual 0.76px, but the fit is slightly offset in the top-right so the v11 house icon overlaps the coastal '30' label). meta player_colors WRONG for one player (lists DOOONGY=RED; actual pieces are ORANGE and BLACK) - assigned by colour-agnostic grant self-check. The top-right black settlement is the inner vertex v11 (=ThePhantom's grant multiset), NOT the coastal v30 (only 2 hexes {ORE,WOOD}, cannot be a granting settlement); the straight-down road matches the vertical v11-v10 edge. ThePhantom (BLACK) settlements v11=[2,9,10] and v20=[5,15,16] (roads v11-v10, v20-v19). DOOONGY (ORANGE) settlements v9=[1,6,18] and v18=[4,13,14] (roads v9-v22, v18-v17). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES per player: ThePhantom {ORE,WHEAT,WOOD} equals exactly v11 (WHE10+ORE5+WOO8) and NOT v20 (BRI5+SHE10+WHE8={BRICK,SHEEP,WHEAT}); DOOONGY {ORE,SHEEP,WOOD} equals exactly v9 (SHE9+ORE4+WOO6) and NOT v18 (WHE6+SHE12+BRI9={WHEAT,SHEEP,BRICK}). Verified via 2.5-4.5x crops.
